meaning: n.错误的诊断,误诊 错误的判断
examples: This "Misdiagnosis" shocked me though the word was often heard in hospitals.
It also limits misdiagnosis of TB and unnecessary and often costly treatments.
To compound this misdiagnosis, The Economist proffers medicine that would do more harm than good.
One in 20 hospitalized patients will die because of misdiagnosis, studies cited in the book show.
